title: campanula lingulata var. capitata
intro: Campanula lingulata var. capitata, also known as the Bellflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a valuable herb for treating various ailments. Campanula lingulata var. capitata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
